name: Raspberry-Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Peaches (fresh or frozen), thawed, drained, reserving juices
2 cups Raspberries (fresh or frozen), thawed, drained, reserving juices
1/2 cup Hazelnuts, pecans, or walnuts, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Roll out dough for the bottom crust and place it in a 9-inch pie pan. Trim and chill.
To make the filling, mix flour and sugar together. Add drained fruit, nuts, and optional rum. Stir in half of the reserved juices. Mix well with your hands until combined. Place the filling in the crust and dot with butter.
To add a top crust, brush the edge of the bottom crust with water to adhere. Press on a lattice crust or place a full crust over it, pierced or decorated. Brush with glaze. Bake for 3/4 hour in a hot oven until the crust is golden and juices are bubbling.
